title: The LORD Our God Is King!

verses.text: Fire that consumes his foes fiercely before him goes. His thunder bolts are fright’ning: the world’s lit up with lightning. Earth trembles at the sight. The mountains, great in height, like wax all melt away in terror and dismay when God reveals his might. 2009 Standing Committee for the Publication of the Book of Praise of the Canadian Reformed Churches

The heavens ev’rywhere his righteousness declare. The world in awe and wonder beholds his holy splendor. But God puts those to shame who do not fear his name, who in their idols boast, and all their worthless host. You gods, all worship him! 2009 Standing Committee for the Publication of the Book of Praise of the Canadian Reformed Churches

Now Zion lifts her voice; all Judah’s towns rejoice. They heard the proclamation of glorious vindication. LORD, none with you compare, for God Most High you are. The earth is yours alone; exalted is your throne, supreme forevermore. 2009 Standing Committee for the Publication of the Book of Praise of the Canadian Reformed Churches

Let evil be abhorred by those who love the LORD. The faithful he will ever from wicked men deliver. Light dawns for the upright; in joy they will delight. You saints, rejoice in him and praise his holy name. Extol his glorious might! 2009 Standing Committee for the Publication of the Book of Praise of the Canadian Reformed Churches
